headline: Welltower's Q1 FFO Beat Estimates on Strong SHO NOI Growth

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Ventas, Raises Price Target to $95
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Ventas (NYSE:VTR) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $94 to $95.
